The Master' 'l!lswers--True, the Sun is exalted in Aries. But there is
Rahu in P:isces--Witp.]'Aars and Mercury fighting with each other and caught
up by Rahu. The Su~ will be shadowed by this unhappy combination in the
adjoining bouse. Rahu's help makes Mercury win in the fight and Mars is
defeated. This' shows that the native lost her husband at an early age (7th to
Venus is owned by Mars).
Next take the case of Venus who is to give happiness. He has his enemy

90 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
the Sun in the preceding house, and another staunch enemy Jupiter exalted in
the 3rd bouse to Venus. As Venus is trapped between these planets he is unable
to be of any help. As a result the husband was employed in Government (the
Sun next to Mars). Mars is with Mercury, a brother. The native will get some
money as a result ofthe death of the partner; but there will be legal problems
as the Sun is between Venus and Mars. It is the brother of the husband that
